questions.stem: Chef Cheetah cut a giant sandwich into 8 equal pieces. He gave 2 to a friend. What fraction is left?
questions.visual_context: Sandwich divided into 8 squares. 2 red (given away), 6 green (remaining).

diagnostics.0: 2/8 is how much he GAVE away, not what is left.
diagnostics.2: 1/2 = 4 pieces. He has more than that!
diagnostics.3: 8/8 means he kept everything, but he shared.

hint.level_2: Denominator (bottom) = 8 total.

solution_steps: Look at the numerator and denominator
The denominator tells total equal parts
The numerator tells how many parts chosen
